_comment: Add the block inside 'hooks.PostToolUse' in your project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json for global). Merge with any existing PostToolUse hooks — do not replace them.

hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == */docs/plans/*.md || "$file" == */docs/architecture.md || "$file" == */docs/*.md ]]; then echo "⚠  html-artifacts: source doc changed — run 'html-artifacts refresh' to update docs/html/"; fi
